description: Reputation Management — prohibits review gating, paid undisclosed reviews, non-disparagement clauses, and fake reviews; monitors sentiment trends and review response timeliness

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any reputation management operation
AI-generated review responses must be reviewed by a human before posting — automated responses require prior template approval
review and sentiment data must be sourced from verified platforms — no fabricated or manipulated data feeds
NEVER gate reviews — asking only satisfied customers to post reviews while suppressing dissatisfied ones is prohibited by the FTC and violates Google, Yelp, and Facebook policies
FTC Endorsement Guides — any incentivized or paid review must include clear and conspicuous disclosure of the material connection
Consumer Review Fairness Act — NEVER include non-disparagement clauses in contracts that restrict customers from posting honest reviews
NEVER create, solicit, or post fake reviews from employees, associates, or bots — FTC considers this deceptive practice
public review responses must never include customer PII (full name, deal details, credit information) — privacy violation

soft_flags.logic: negative reviews (1-2 stars) have not received a response within 24 hours
average rating across monitored platforms is declining over trailing 30 days
negative sentiment percentage in reviews is increasing over trailing 30 days
customer review mentions a potential compliance or regulatory issue (deceptive pricing, discrimination, etc.) that should be investigated
